## Description / Excerpt

A systems-oriented rereading of Machiavelli as an analyst of coordination, legitimacy, perception, feedback, and political stability under uncertainty.

Excerpt:

Few political thinkers have been as persistently misunderstood as Niccolò Machiavelli. In popular culture, his name has become shorthand for manipulation, ruthlessness, and the cynical pursuit of power. Yet a closer reading of Machiavelli—especially from the vantage point of mode
